title: Splesh by Cusheen 3-ply Toilet Roll - Unscented (72 Pack) Soft, Quilted Bulk Toilet Rolls, Toilet Tissue and Loo Rolls – Eco-Friendly Toilet Paper Sustainably Crafted in The UK
features: QUILTED LUXURY: Splesh is thicker & stronger than Cusheen - 3-Ply toilet rolls made from 3 layers of super soft white tissue paper, for maximum absorption
ECO FRIENDLY: Unlike Cusheen - Splesh toilet roll is now fully FSC certified to protect forest diversity & is made from sustainably sourced virgin pulp
RECYCLABLE & BIODEGRADABLE: The 3-ply tissues & inner rolls are recyclable & biodegradable - environmentally conscious bathroom products
SUSTAINBLE HOUSEHOLD SUPPLIES: Our toilet roll is made in the United Kingdom and the plastic packaging is made from 30% recycled materials
BULK BUY: This pack of 72 toilet rolls is perfect for your home to suit your families needs

NOW THICKER & STRONGER Our 3-ply toilet rolls are crafted from three layers of ultra-soft white tissue paper, ensuring maximum absorbency. EMBOSSED DESIGN Deluxe toilet paper with unique embossed design, boosting visual appeal and offering a softer, more luxurious feel. MADE IN BRITAIN Our toilet roll is made in the United Kingdom and the plastic packaging is made from 30% sustainable materials. SUSTAINABLY SOURCED Splesh toilet roll is now fully FSC certified to protect forest diversity & is made from sustainable sourced fiber and virgin pulp. Previous page Next page What is the ply count of this toilet paper? This toilet paper is 3-ply, which means each sheet is composed of three layers. This construction enhances its strength, softness, and absorbency compared to lower ply options. Does this toilet paper dissolve easily and is it septic safe? Absolutely, this toilet paper is engineered to dissolve faster than other brands, making it highly septic safe. Its quick-dissolving properties ensure it won’t clog pipes or harm septic systems. How soft and absorbent is this toilet paper? Thanks to its 3-ply construction, our toilet paper is exceptionally soft and highly absorbent. This makes it comfortable to use while ensuring effective cleanliness. What is the sheet count per roll? The product offers up to 150 sheets per roll, providing good value. Is this toilet paper environmentally responsible or crafted from regenerated fibers? Thirty percent of this product is made from recycled materials, and its primary component is pulp fiber.
